item.title: The Personal Toll of War
item.description: A veteran reflects on the physical and emotional impact of war. Honest insights into how combat and service leave lasting effects on those who serve.

media:content.media:title: The Personal Toll of War
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the physical and emotional impact of war. Honest insights into how combat and service leave lasting effects on those who serve.

item.title: Green Beret Michael Rodríguez’s Service Story
item.description: Michael “Rod” Rodríguez recounts 21 years as a Green Beret, 10 deployments, combat injuries, and efforts to help civilians, including the struggles of women in Afghanistan.

media:content.media:title: Green Beret Michael Rodríguez’s Service Story
media:content.media:description: Michael “Rod” Rodríguez recounts 21 years as a Green Beret, 10 deployments, combat injuries, and efforts to help civilians, including the struggles of women in Afghanistan.

item.title: The Korean War: Harder Than You Think
item.description: Explore the harsh realities of the Korean War, from brutal combat to extreme conditions. Learn why this conflict was more intense and challenging than commonly remembered.

media:content.media:title: The Korean War: Harder Than You Think
media:content.media:description: Explore the harsh realities of the Korean War, from brutal combat to extreme conditions. Learn why this conflict was more intense and challenging than commonly remembered.

item.title: Finding Faith on Iwo Jima
item.description: A veteran recounts a profound spiritual experience on Iwo Jima. Discover how the intensity of battle led to a deep personal connection with faith during WWII.

media:content.media:title: Finding Faith on Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts a profound spiritual experience on Iwo Jima. Discover how the intensity of battle led to a deep personal connection with faith during WWII.

item.title: The Last Living D-Day Pilot
item.description: Meet the final surviving pilot from D-Day who navigated history. Hear firsthand stories of bravery, strategy, and the crucial role they played in WWII’s pivotal invasion.

media:content.media:title: The Last Living D-Day Pilot
media:content.media:description: Meet the final surviving pilot from D-Day who navigated history. Hear firsthand stories of bravery, strategy, and the crucial role they played in WWII’s pivotal invasion.

item.title: Navy SEAL Jason Redman’s Heroic Combat Story
item.description: Jason Redman recounts a 2007 Fallujah mission where he and his team faced heavy fire. Despite multiple injuries, they secured victory and all teammates returned home safely.

media:content.media:title: Navy SEAL Jason Redman’s Heroic Combat Story
media:content.media:description: Jason Redman recounts a 2007 Fallujah mission where he and his team faced heavy fire. Despite multiple injuries, they secured victory and all teammates returned home safely.

item.title: Near the Twin Towers During 9/11
item.description: A firsthand account of being just blocks away when the Twin Towers fell. Experience the immediate chaos, fear, and personal perspective of that historic day.

media:content.media:title: Near the Twin Towers During 9/11
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of being just blocks away when the Twin Towers fell. Experience the immediate chaos, fear, and personal perspective of that historic day.

item.title: Intense Close-Quarters Combat in Iraq
item.description: Experience intense close-quarters combat in Iraq through firsthand accounts. See the challenges, tactics, and realities faced by soldiers in tight, high-stakes situations.

media:content.media:title: Intense Close-Quarters Combat in Iraq
media:content.media:description: Experience intense close-quarters combat in Iraq through firsthand accounts. See the challenges, tactics, and realities faced by soldiers in tight, high-stakes situations.

item.title: The Decision That Changed the World Forever
item.description: Explore a pivotal decision in history that reshaped the world. Learn the context, consequences, and lasting impact of this monumental choice.

media:content.media:title: The Decision That Changed the World Forever
media:content.media:description: Explore a pivotal decision in history that reshaped the world. Learn the context, consequences, and lasting impact of this monumental choice.

item.title: Pissing Off My German Captors
item.description: A WWII veteran recounts daring moments of defiance against German captors. Hear firsthand stories of courage, cleverness, and resistance in captivity.

media:content.media:title: Pissing Off My German Captors
media:content.media:description: A WWII veteran recounts daring moments of defiance against German captors. Hear firsthand stories of courage, cleverness, and resistance in captivity.

item.title: In Ramadi: Every Step a Gamble
item.description: A firsthand account from Iraq’s deadliest city, Ramadi. Hear what it was like to navigate constant danger, risk, and combat in one of the most perilous urban war zones.

media:content.media:title: In Ramadi: Every Step a Gamble
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account from Iraq’s deadliest city, Ramadi. Hear what it was like to navigate constant danger, risk, and combat in one of the most perilous urban war zones.

item.title: The Bravery That Earned a Medal of Honor
item.description: Hear the heroic story behind a Medal of Honor. Learn how extraordinary courage, sacrifice, and decisive action led to one of the highest military honors.

media:content.media:title: The Bravery That Earned a Medal of Honor
media:content.media:description: Hear the heroic story behind a Medal of Honor. Learn how extraordinary courage, sacrifice, and decisive action led to one of the highest military honors.
